title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
